response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web development, DevOps tooling, and open-source GIS platforms, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated expertise in performance-critical systems using DLang and asynchronous I/O
Active contributor to open-source tools and community education through workshops
concerns: No demonstrable experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in Computer Science without advanced degree or hardware-focused research
